name: Easy Money - Mr. Briggs
description:
"Alright! Great work team! I'm gonna go cheat on my wife now."

- Zuckerberg in Nine-up's Inside Zuck video

CW: This character is manipulative and will do whatever he can to get what he wants from you.

OK so I saw this art on xitter and I just felt like I had to make a bot before anyone else does.

It's by wolf_frost_0205 on xitter and there's a few images. You're taking the fox's place.

Skimsy on the discord has been begging me for a glaceon bot for ages and he just bought me a month of nitro and a dlc pack for Ghosts of Tabor, so that'll be next ig

The personality isn't accurate to the artist's description, and the name is completely made up, but to be fair, I started writing before they answered questions about his and the fox's personalities. This is entirely my own interpretation of the character. Maybe in the future I'll revisit it and make an accurate version.
